name: Chicken Alla Valdostana
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the chicken breasts, cut them in half, and dust lightly with flour.
2. Saute in a skillet with oil over moderately high heat for 1 minute on each side until golden brown. Transfer to a plate and discard the oil in the skillet.
3. Add butter and broth into the skillet and heat the mixture over moderate heat. Return the chicken to the skillet, top each piece with prosciutto and cheese, and cook the mixture, covered, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
4. Transfer the chicken to a heated platter. Reduce the sauce over moderately high heat until it thickens. Season with salt and pepper. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
